name: Return of the Wild: The Bearman of Buncrana
original_name: Return of the Wild: The Bearman of Buncrana
overview: In a small pocket of Donegal woodland, Killian McLaughlin is attempting to turn back the hands of time and return all of Ireland's majestic native animals to their ancestral home, where they used to live in its ancient forests.

trailers.title: 🎥 Return of the Wild: The Bearman of Buncrana now streaming on Netflix
